status_note: Latency-optimized variant of cyankiwi-seq8: MTP K=4 (sweep optimum) + matched cudagraph capture + repetition_penalty=1.0. Local benchmarks show ~+8% average decode latency over the K=7 config at equal quality; weights and chat template are unchanged.

isolation_gate.lever: MTP K=4 + matched cudagraph capture + repetition_penalty=1.0

local_measurements.summary: scripts/bench_latency.py, n=10/warmup=3, cold-mixed. Average +8.1% over cyankiwi-seq8 (short +17.0%, medium +8.1%, long +1.2%).
10%-sample quality gate: MMLU-Pro 0.642 (floor 0.621) PASS, IFEval 0.862 (floor 0.814) PASS. Consistent with the quality-neutral expectation for a runtime-only change.

notes: Config delta vs cyankiwi-seq8: num_speculative_tokens 7->4; cudagraph capture sizes {8..64} -> {5,10,...,40}; repetition_penalty default -> 1.0.
